nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dunstanville was born in 1028. He married Sybila Adela FitzHerbert in 1054, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1124, in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 96, and was buried in Castle Combe, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dunstanville est né en 1028. Il a épousé Sybila Adela FitzHerbert en 1054, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1124, à Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 96 ans, et a été enterré à Castle Combe, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dunstanvilleは1028年に生まれた。1054年にイギリスでSybila Adela FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1124年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベで96歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアカストル コンベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dunstanville(은)는 1028년 태어났다. 그는 1054년 영국에서 Sybila Adela FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1124년 영국 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에서 96세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 카스틀 코브에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hugh de Dunstanville родился в 1028 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybila Adela FitzHerbert в 1054 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1124 г. в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 96 лет и был похоронен в местности кастл комб, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания.
